parameters.name: wiki_name
parameters.description: display name of the wiki, e.g. 'Acme Engineering Docs'

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: HTTP port the wiki serves on

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.description: project/org prefix for cloud resource naming (iac)

post_emit_notes: Fill codebases.json: copy content/codebases.json.example to <WIKI_CONTENT_DIR>/codebases.json and list your codebases as [{ name, maps_dir }]; maps_dir must contain (or have a docs/ containing) *_MAP.md files.
Run npm install, then npm run dev (dev) or npm run build && npm run start (production). Set WIKI_CONTENT_DIR (see .env.example).
Local Docker hosting: docker compose up --build (maps your content dir into /app/content read-only; /health backs the healthcheck).

Cloud hosting (aws/gcp): emit the config-management phenotype and apply its platform (+ load-balancer) layers FIRST; then build + push the wiki image; then in iac/<cloud> copy dev.tfvars.example to dev.tfvars, fill platform_state_bucket + image (REPLACE- placeholders), and tofu init && tofu apply.

No secrets, account ids, or domains are baked: every account-bound value is a REPLACE- placeholder or a {{param}} default. Validate iac/<cloud> with tofu init -backend=false && tofu validate after rendering.
